title: diabelia spathulata var. spathulata
intro: Diabelia spathulata var. spathulata is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to eastern Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sweating and relieve fever, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of the common cold, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Diabelia spathulata var. spathulata is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be found in the form of dried leaves or roots, which can be used to make teas or tinctures.
